item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-4885 - WordPress
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-4885 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 9.8
Resumo:
The Piotnet Addons for Elementor Pro plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to arbitrary file upload due to missing file type validation in the 'pafe_ajax_form_builder' function in all versions up to, and including, 7.1.70. The plugin uses an incomplete extension blacklist that only blocks php, phpt, php5, php7, and exe extensions, while allowing dangerous extensions such as .phar or .phtml to be uploaded. This makes it...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-4885

item.title: [Infraestrutura] CVE-2026-8711 - Nginx
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-8711 - Nginx
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Nginx
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 8.1
Resumo:
NGINX JavaScript has a vulnerability when the js_fetch_proxy directive is configured with at least one client-controlled NGINX variable (for example, $http_*, $arg_*, $cookie_*) and a location invoking the ngx.fetch() operation from NGINX JavaScript. An unauthenticated attacker can exploit this vulnerability by sending crafted HTTP requests. This may cause a heap buffer overflow in the NGINX worker process leading to...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-8711

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-46333 (ssh-keysign-pwn) Linux kernel vulnerability mitigations
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-46333 (ssh-keysign-pwn) Linux kernel vulnerability mitigations
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/blog/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A member of our team will be in touch shortly. Close Thank you for signing up for our newsletter! In these regular emails you will find the latest updates about Ubuntu and upcoming events where you can meet our team. Close Your preferences have been successfully updated. Close notification Please try again or file a bug report. Close Blog An information disclosure security vulnerability in the Linux kernel was public...
Link: https://ubuntu.com//blog/ssh-keysign-pwn-linux-vulnerability-fixes-available

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] USN-8286-1: OpenVPN vulnerabilities
item.description:
🚨 USN-8286-1: OpenVPN vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Guannan Wang, Zhanpeng Liu, Guancheng Li, and Emma Reuter discovered that OpenVPN incorrectly handled suitably malformed packets with valid tls-crypt-v2 keys. An attacker could possibly use this issue to cause OpenVPN to crash, resulting in a denial of service. (CVE-2026-35058) Guannan Wang, Zhanpeng Liu, and Guancheng Li discovered that OpenVPN had a race condition in the TLS handshake process that could leak packet...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8286-1

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] USN-8284-1: GnuTLS vulnerabilities
item.description:
🚨 USN-8284-1: GnuTLS vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Joshua Rogers discovered that GnuTLS did not properly handle malformed DTLS handshake fragments in certain cases. A remote attacker could possibly use this issue to obtain sensitive information, or cause a denial of service. (CVE-2026-33845) Haruto Kimura, Oscar Reparaz, and Zou Dikai discovered that GnuTLS did not properly validate DTLS handshake fragment lengths in certain cases. A remote attacker could possibly us...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8284-1

item.title: [Segurança] Microsoft Releases Mitigation for YellowKey BitLocker Bypass CVE-2026-45585 Exploit
item.description:
🚨 Microsoft Releases Mitigation for YellowKey BitLocker Bypass CVE-2026-45585 Exploit
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 6.8
Resumo:
Microsoft on Tuesday released a mitigation for a BitLocker bypass vulnerability named YellowKey following its public disclosure last week. The zero-day flaw, now tracked as CVE-2026-45585, carries a CVSS score of 6.8. It has been described as a BitLocker security feature bypass. "Microsoft is aware of a security feature bypass vulnerability in Windows publicly referred to as 'YellowKey,'" the
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/05/microsoft-releases-mitigation-for.html

item.title: [Segurança] Exploit released for new PinTheft Arch Linux root escalation flaw
item.description:
💣 Exploit released for new PinTheft Arch Linux root escalation flaw
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
PinTheft, a recently patched Linux privilege escalation vulnerability, now has a publicly available proof-of-concept (PoC) exploit that allows local attackers to gain root privileges on Arch Linux systems.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/linux/exploit-released-for-new-pintheft-arch-linux-root-escalation-flaw/

item.title: [Segurança] Drupal critical update to fix bug with high exploitation risk
item.description:
💣 Drupal critical update to fix bug with high exploitation risk
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Drupal has announced a "core security release" scheduled for later today, warning that threat actors might develop exploits within hours of the update disclosure.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/drupal-critical-update-to-fix-bug-with-high-exploitation-risk/

item.title: [Segurança] Microsoft Takes Down Malware-Signing Service Behind Ransomware Attacks
item.description:
📰 Microsoft Takes Down Malware-Signing Service Behind Ransomware Attacks
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Microsoft on Tuesday said it disrupted a malware-signing-as-a-service (MSaaS) operation that weaponized the company's Artifact Signing system to deliver malicious code and conduct ransomware and other attacks, compromising thousands of machines and networks across the world. The tech giant attributed the activity to a threat actor it calls Fox Tempest, which it said offered the MSaaS scheme
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/05/microsoft-takes-down-malware-signing.html

Fonte: Google News RSS

Resumo:

item.title: [Segurança] Cybercrime service disrupted for abusing Microsoft platform to sign malware
item.description:
📰 Cybercrime service disrupted for abusing Microsoft platform to sign malware
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Microsoft says it has disrupted a malware-signing-as-a-service (MSaaS) operation that abused the company's Artifact Signing service to generate fraudulent code-signing certificates used by ransomware gangs and other cybercriminals.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/cybercrime-service-disrupted-for-abusing-microsoft-platform-to-sign-malware/
